name: Forklift Leg Amputation Settlements Bountiful UT

mainEntity.name: Average settlement for forklift leg amputation in Bountiful UT?
mainEntity.text: Average settlement for forklift leg amputation in Bountiful UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah scheduled loss: full leg below knee ~200 weeks x $800+ weekly rate = $160K+ base, plus medical/lost wages. Actual averages $250K-$500K with attorney.

suggestedAnswer.text: Amputations from runaway forklifts trigger high PPD awards but insurers lowball life impacts. Bountiful cases add prosthetics/retraining costs. Expert testimony boosts value; settlements rise 2-3x without lawyer per Utah stats.
